meaning: n.意图,目的,意向,[律](犯罪或侵权行为的)故意adj.专心的,决心的,热心的
examples: His intent is clearly not to placate his critics.
I was so intent on my work that I didn't notice the time.
His intent was to connect college students.
Connecticut divines intent from 28 factors ranging from where you register your dog to where you pray.
The Dragons though showed intent from the off and claimed the first points through Jason Tovey's straightforward penalty.
